caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, glasses, a gold watch, and a grey, peaked wig that resembles a judge's hair. He wears black headphones over the wig and sits before a black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with various framed photographs and a "LEE" branded clothing display. On-screen graphics featuring a red microphone logo and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" are visible on the left and right sides of the frame. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking while gesturing with his right hand toward his chin and cheek. His facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, and his hand moves incrementally upward and then back down, indicating a continuous conversation during the podcast recording.
